title: INSERT INTO ... EXCEPT ... fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp_c (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE TABLE tmp_d (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO tmp_c (name, value) SELECT name, value FROM tmp_d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tmp_c WHERE tmp_c.name = tmp_d.name AND tmp_c.value = tmp_d.value);
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO with EXCEPT clause fails
